code:
import io
import string
import list

fn set_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while j < n
    if j == i
      result = list.push(result, v)
    else
      match xs.get(j)
      when Some(x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      when None
        result = result
      end
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn get_or(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int, _ d: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    d
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let tn = tokens.len()
  while i < tn
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        nums = nums
      end
    when None
      nums = nums
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let k_parsed = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  let n = nums.len()
  mut k = k_parsed
  if k > n
    k = n
  end

  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < n
    used = list.push(used, 0)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut taken = 0
  while taken < k
    mut best_idx = -1
    mut best_val = 0
    mut p = 0
    while p < n
      let u = get_or(used, p, 1)
      if u == 0
        let v = get_or(nums, p, 0)
        if best_idx == -1
          best_idx = p
          best_val = v
        else if v > best_val
          best_idx = p
          best_val = v
        end
      end
      p = p + 1
    end
    used = set_at(used, best_idx, 1)
    if taken == 0
      output = "#{best_val}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{best_val}"
    end
    taken = taken + 1
  end

  println(output)
  Ok(())
end
